introSection: Straight Roller Coaster (Japanese: 直線ジェットコースター) was a steel shuttle roller coaster previously located at Funabashi Health Center in Funabashi, Chiba, Japan. The roller coaster served as transportation between two sections of the park.
fullText: Straight Roller Coaster (Japanese: 直線ジェットコースター) was a steel shuttle roller coaster previously located at Funabashi Health Center in Funabashi, Chiba, Japan. The roller coaster served as transportation between two sections of the park.
